_comment: Species: Sand Scorpion (沙蝎) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Sand Scorpion

canonical.appearance: Armored scorpion 2 m long, pincers can sever iron, stinger drips paralytic venom
canonical.size: 2 m adult, 200 jin; ancient 8 m, 5000 jin
canonical.behavior: Burrows in sand; hunts in packs at dusk; paralyzes prey then drags to nest
canonical.habitat: Fire Burn Country deserts, karma wastes, arid plains
canonical.diet: desert beasts, lost travelers, sand-attribute herbs
canonical.relationships: Pack hunters; preyed upon by giant pythons
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: sand_scorpion — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
